recommendations.title: Latte and the Magic Waterstone
recommendations.overview: When a greedy bear steals a magic stone to keep the forest’s water for himself, a brave hedgehog and a timid squirrel must work together to retrieve it.
recommendations.director: Nina Wels, Andrea Deppert, Regina Welker, Mimi Maynard

recommendations.title: Rugrats in Paris: The Movie
recommendations.overview: A group of rambunctious toddlers travel a trip to Paris. As they journey from the Eiffel Tower to Notre Dame, they learn new lessons about trust, loyalty and love.

recommendations.title: Brother Bear 2
recommendations.overview: Kenai finds his childhood human friend Nita and the two embark on a journey to burn the amulet he gave to her before he was a bear, much to Koda's dismay.

recommendations.title: Benji the Hunted
recommendations.overview: Benji has become stranded on a remote island after a boating accident. He finds himself struggling to survive in the wilderness, avoiding close encounters with a wolf, a bear, and a territorial female cougar with her cub.

recommendations.title: Mufasa: The Lion King
recommendations.overview: Mufasa, a cub lost and alone, meets a sympathetic lion named Taka, the heir to a royal bloodline. The chance meeting sets in motion an expansive journey of a group of misfits searching for their destiny.

recommendations.title: The Jungle Book
recommendations.overview: The boy Mowgli makes his way to the man-village with Bagheera, the wise panther. Along the way he meets jazzy King Louie, the hypnotic snake Kaa and the lovable, happy-go-lucky bear Baloo, who teaches Mowgli "The Bare Necessities" of life and the tru

recommendations.title: Dory's Reef Cam
recommendations.overview: Dive into the waters below and watch the aquatic wildlife from the world of Nemo and Dory.

recommendations.title: Bear Story
recommendations.overview: An old bear goes out every day to a busy street corner. Through a tin marionette theater of his own making, the bear will tell us his life story.

recommendations.title: The Adventures of Pinocchio
recommendations.overview: One of puppet-maker Geppetto's creations comes magically to life. This puppet, Pinocchio, has one major desire and that is to become a real boy someday. In order to accomplish this goal he has to learn to act responsibly. This film shows you the adve

recommendations.title: Mavka: The Forest Song
recommendations.overview: Mavka, a Soul of the Forest, faces an impossible choice between love and her duty as Guardian of the Heart of the Forest when she falls for a human, a talented young musician named Lukas.
